lines.speaker: High Priest of Scabaras
lines.text: Hello, adventurer. Thank you for freeing me from the Devourer. I would be alone now. Scabaras teaches us to remain isolated, and I have much to think about.

sections.title: Using dawn scarab egg on him

lines.speaker: High Priest of Scabaras
lines.text: Adventurer... what is this? It looks like a scarab egg, but is unlike any I've seen before.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: To be honest, I'm not sure, but I think you should have it. It has more hope of hatching with you than with me.

lines.speaker: High Priest of Scabaras
lines.text: Thank you, adventurer. I know not what will come of this, but I feel you have done the right thing. May Scabaras continue to guide you.
